title: CareerForge Language Registry
description: Canonical list of languages CareerForge can be localized into (REQ-7004, ADR-0007).

code.description: BCP-47 language tag (e.g. en, pt-BR, zh-Hans)

endonym.description: The language's name in its own script

script.description: ISO 15924 script code (Latn, Arab, Hans, Deva, ...)

status.description: released = meets NFR-0020 completeness after human review; beta = machine-seeded or incomplete

quality.description: REQ-7011: low-resource flags languages where LLM generation needs extra human review
